FMtopic.Title: Revision Transmittal Letter
FMtopic.Para: This is the MINIMUM EQUIPMENT LIST at issue date 30SEP25 for the B787 and replacing last issue dated 19JUN24

FMtopic.Title: Normal Revision
FMtopic.Para: Issued to cover the FAA MMEL full number revision. The MEL normal revision is numbered in a numerical ascending sequence i.e. 1, 2, 3 and so on.

FMtopic.Title: Intermediate Revision
FMtopic.Para: Intermediate revision is issued between normal revision to cover minor changes but not limited to MMEL supplement, additional aircraft registration, correction to current approved MEL, etc. They are numbered in ascending sequence i.e. 1A, 1B, 1C… for intermediate revisions issued between normal revision 1 and 2.

FMtopic.Title: Temporary Revision
FMtopic.Para: Temporary Revisions are printed on yellow paper and issued to address urgent matters arising between normal revisions. They are accompanied by a List of Effective Temporary Pages. When a temporary content replaces an existing content rather than introducing a new one, the replaced content is displayed on a grey cross-hatched background for clear identification.
Several Temporary Revisions may coexist until a Normal Revision is issued incorporating all of them. - Refer to Section 4.2.5.1 – VNA Quality Manual (QM)
- Refer to Section 4.2.5.1 – VNA Quality Manual (QM)
For any questions or comments related to this manual, please contact the Flight Operation Engineering Dept (FOE). FOR DISTRIBUTION RELATED QUESTIONS
Mailing address: FLIGHT OPERATIONS ENGINEERING DEPARTMENT 200 NGUYEN SON STREET - LONG BIEN DISTRICT - HA NOI - VIETNAM TEL : +84 24 38 732 732/ ext: 2856

FMtopic.Title: Filing Instructions
FMtopic.Para: Consult the List of Effective Pages. The List of Effective Pages determines the correct content of the manual. Pages identified with an asterisk (*) are either replacement pages or new (original) issue pages.
Pages may be re-dated without revision bars. This is due to repagination of content. The List of Effected Pages will reflect the date change, but there will not be a corresponding revision highlight.

FMtopic.Title: Revision Highlights
FMtopic.Para: Specific changes in this revision are noted in the highlights.
